query: SELECT availableCash, initialCapital FROM paperLedger WHERE userId=1; SELECT COUNT(*) as openPositions, SUM(allocatedCapital) as totalAllocated FROM paperPositions WHERE userId=1 AND status='open'; SELECT COUNT(*) as trades, SUM(allocatedCapital) as totalAllocatedIn FROM paperTrades WHERE userId=1;
